title: Eddies in the Mind
byline: By a staff writer, unnamed — the name is earned when the first specimen is described
thesis: A failure mode is the shadow of a training objective, run out of distribution — negativity bias and sycophancy are the same law on two substrates, and the LLM is the Drosophila that lets us finally dissect it.
description: The anchor feature: the machine as model organism for cognition. Eight movements from the eddies we inherited to the eddies we built, with one falsifiable experiment the essay runs rather than borrows — design registered before the bench ran, hash in the box. The bench came home before the expedition departed: the registered prediction came back null on one subject and reversed on the other, and the box prints it unsoftened.
